name: Prometheus Exporter Output
rawText:
# HELP selidiki_uptime_seconds System uptime in seconds
# TYPE selidiki_uptime_seconds gauge
selidiki_uptime_seconds 0
# HELP selidiki_provider_switch_total Total number of database provider switches
# TYPE selidiki_provider_switch_total counter
selidiki_provider_switch_total 1
# HELP selidiki_rollback_total Total number of rollback actions triggered
# TYPE selidiki_rollback_total counter
selidiki_rollback_total 1
# HELP selidiki_shadow_mismatch_total Total number of shadow read/write mismatches
# TYPE selidiki_shadow_mismatch_total counter
selidiki_shadow_mismatch_total 0
# HELP selidiki_repository_errors_total Total number of repository query errors
# TYPE selidiki_repository_errors_total counter
selidiki_repository_errors_total 0
# HELP selidiki_circuit_breaker_state Current circuit breaker state (0 = closed, 1 = open)
# TYPE selidiki_circuit_breaker_state gauge
selidiki_circuit_breaker_state 0
# HELP selidiki_pool_utilization_ratio Active database connection pool utilization ratio
# TYPE selidiki_pool_utilization_ratio gauge
selidiki_pool_utilization_ratio 0.00
# HELP selidiki_request_latency_seconds_bucket Latency histogram of requests
# TYPE selidiki_request_latency_seconds_bucket histogram
selidiki_request_latency_seconds_bucket{le="0.005"} 12
selidiki_request_latency_seconds_bucket{le="0.01"} 34
selidiki_request_latency_seconds_bucket{le="0.05"} 78
selidiki_request_latency_seconds_bucket{le="0.1"} 92
selidiki_request_latency_seconds_bucket{le="0.5"} 100
selidiki_request_latency_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf"} 100
selidiki_request_latency_seconds_sum 1.25
selidiki_request_latency_seconds_count 100
